name: DroidForge
desc: DroidForge — Android Project Scaffolder Pick your modules, choose Java or Kotlin, and get a complete Android Studio project as a ZIP. RecyclerView, Retrofit, Room, ViewModel, Navigation, Hilt, Auto-generated GitHub Actions, Ready to open, build, and run. Spend time on features, not boilerplate

name: C-Compiler Lite.apk
desc:
C-Compiler Lite – Build C/C++ directly on Android

What it does:
Compile C/C++ source code into binary executables or shared libraries (.so) using Android NDK.

Not AIDE:
This is not an IDE. There is no code editor. Write your source with any text editor (QuickEdit, mt manager, etc.), then use this app to build.

Requirements:
- Android 7.0+
- Storage permission
- Install NDK  Settings menu

Output:
- Binary executable
- Shared library (.so)

Quick guide:
1. Create project in /sdcard/CProject/
2. Place your C/C++ source and Android.mk inside
3. Open app, select project folder, press Build

Note:
Play Protect warning may appear on install.
Tap "More details" > "Install anyway". The app is safe.
